# Sift Announces Integration with Salesforce Commerce Cloud to Power E-commerce Growth

Protect your e-commerce business and fuel explosive growth with the new Sift + Salesforce Commerce Cloud integration. And requires little to no code!

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift Trust and Safety Team

Aug 4, 2020

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

As consumers come to expect more intelligent shopping experiences, many innovative brands have turned to Salesforce Commerce Cloud to create immersive storefronts that drive conversion and revenue growth. Today, we’re excited to announce the availability of a cartridge in the Commerce Cloud Partner Marketplace that makes it possible to unlock Sift protection for your e-commerce business with little to no code.

![](https://dev-sift.pantheonsite.io/app/uploads/2020/08/sfccsift-1.png)

## Digital Trust & Safety for Salesforce Commerce Cloud

The fastest-growing e-commerce businesses take every opportunity to gain an edge over the competition—finding new ways to drive demand, engage buyers, and increase revenue. But revenue-driving features can also increase exposure to fraud. For every user swayed by a streamlined shopping experience, there’s a fraudster waiting to exploit it. This is why the realization that sets e-commerce leaders apart is that fraud prevention needs to be a component of your growth strategy.

By integrating Sift into your storefront, you can take full advantage of the Salesforce Commerce Cloud platform without exposing your business to risk. Driving revenue and preventing fraud ultimately come down to the same thing: tailoring the user journey based on an accurate assessment of risk. The unparalleled accuracy of our machine learning models and our global data network provide this visibility. 

## Growth is about more than just your top line

Sift’s solution for Salesforce Commerce Cloud gives you the technology and tools you need to grow your business scalably—maximizing conversion while keeping fraud and operational costs low.

![](https://dev-sift.pantheonsite.io/app/uploads/2020/08/console-sfcc.png)  

*   **Stop fraud losses and chargebacks:** Our real-time machine learning delivers unparalleled accuracy that enables you to proactively block fraud and stay ahead of emerging trends.
*   **Drive growth:** A holistic approach to risk assessment powered by Sift allows you to approve more orders, reduce false positives, and maximize revenue—which is especially important during holidays and peak times when consumer behavior shifts.
*   **Streamline operations:** While the accuracy of Sift machine learning enables many merchants to automate more than 95% of decisions, we include access to our intuitive Console to improve the efficiency of fraud operations and policy management. 
*   **Integrate quickly:** Using our new cartridge for Salesforce Commerce Cloud, you can unlock Sift protection faster than ever.

## Kick your e-commerce business into high gear

Ready to learn more about the impact Sift could have on your business? Contact us to request a demo of our solution for Salesforce Commerce Cloud.

* * *

If you’re a systems integrator or consultant interested in the ways the Sift solution could benefit your clients, our partnership team would love to speak with you. Get the conversation started.
